proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab have different mean pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_cetuximab.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab have different mean pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_bevacizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different mean pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib have different mean pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_encorafenib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib have different mean pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib have different mean pfs_months compared to those not receiving treatment_regorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 4.29 with treatment_cetuximab vs 4.32 without (n=15078 vs 34922). Effect=-0.038, p=0.0880.
Mean pfs_months: 4.30 with treatment_bevacizumab vs 4.32 without (n=22383 vs 27617). Effect=-0.019, p=0.3544.
Mean pfs_months: 4.32 with treatment_pembrolizumab vs 4.31 without (n=7660 vs 42340). Effect=0.005, p=0.8557.
Mean pfs_months: 4.32 with treatment_encorafenib vs 4.31 without (n=5111 vs 44889). Effect=0.005, p=0.8725.
Mean pfs_months: 4.27 with treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib vs 4.32 without (n=4033 vs 45967). Effect=-0.044, p=0.2435.
Mean pfs_months: 5.09 with treatment_regorafenib vs 4.12 without (n=10022 vs 39978). Effect=0.972, p=0.0000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs by msi_high status.
The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months differs by msi_high status.
The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months differs by msi_high status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect of treatment_cetuximab x msi_high on pfs_months: -0.046, p=0.1147, n=50000.
Interaction effect of treatment_bevacizumab x msi_high on pfs_months: -0.024, p=0.3338, n=50000.
Interaction effect of treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high on pfs_months: 0.005, p=0.9879, n=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 receiving treatment_cetuximab have different pfs_months compared to stage_iv=0 patients receiving treatment_cetuximab.
Patients with stage_iv=1 receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different pfs_months compared to stage_iv=0 patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.
Patients with stage_iv=1 receiving treatment_bevacizumab have different pfs_months compared to stage_iv=0 patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Stage IV effect of treatment_cetuximab: -0.027 (stage IV) vs -0.056 (non-IV). Difference=0.029, p=0.3402 (stage IV).
Stage IV effect of treatment_pembrolizumab: 0.031 (stage IV) vs -0.006 (non-IV). Difference=0.036, p=0.3953 (stage IV).
Stage IV effect of treatment_bevacizumab: -0.019 (stage IV) vs -0.015 (non-IV). Difference=-0.004, p=0.4823 (stage IV).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs by kras_mutation status.
The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs by nras_mutation status.

Interaction effect of treatment_cetuximab x nras_mutation on pfs_months: -0.037, p=0.9596, n=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs by age_years (younger vs older patients).
The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months differs by age_years (younger vs older patients).

analyses.result_summary: Age interaction for treatment_cetuximab: effect in young=0.014, old=-0.042. Difference=0.056, p=0.5685.
Age interaction for treatment_pembrolizumab: effect in young=-0.003, old=0.009. Difference=-0.012, p=0.9143.

The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months differs by nlr (high vs low).

The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months differs by albumin_g_dl (high vs low).

Albumin interaction for treatment_pembrolizumab: effect in high albumin=0.035, low albumin=-0.035. Difference=0.071, p=0.3629.
Albumin interaction for treatment_bevacizumab: effect in high albumin=-0.019, low albumin=-0.020. Difference=0.000, p=0.4878.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months is strongest in patients with msi_high=-0.05 vs -0.05 without, suggesting msi_high modifies treatment effect.

analyses.result_summary: Best interaction: treatment_cetuximab x msi_high. Interaction effect=-0.046, p=0.1147, n=50000.
